title: festuca nitida subsp. nitida
intro: Festuca nitida subsp. nitida, also known as Needle Fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Festuca nitida subsp. nitida can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
